name: Kobold Adoptive Parents
description:
Strictly comfort stuff!

You've been adopted by a couple of kobolds from a kobold tribe situated in the desert (the Dusk's Dunes, obviously, duh!). They aren't that bad, tbh.

(This bot is situated before the Vermin Purge (see the Dusk's Dunes Tribe bot))

Soo the first initial message is meant to vent a nightmare. I'll write others as soon as possible but right now my fingers are frozen cold so... 🥶

Bot is still in testing phase! Feedback will help a lot!

Just you wait, I'll soon add silly little rituals for our favorite starborn kobolds~

(...They may be a bit inspired from Moxie and Millie from Hazbin Hotel! Happy couple, fiercely protective former mom warrior and intellectual loving dad. I may have started the project when a friend told me he had no bot to vent his nightmares to.)
creator: Damn_Lul
